---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
labels: feature
---

## Description
Brief description of the feature you'd like to propose.

## Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?

## Proposed Solution
What's your proposed approach to solving this problem?

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criteria 1
- [ ] Criteria 2
- [ ] All tests pass

## Implementation Notes
Any technical considerations, dependencies, or constraints to be aware of?

## Additional Context
Any other context, screenshots, or references?
